creator: svysh.fbsd@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 227328
"git diff" to update the port

- update 7.900056 -> 7.900057
Changes: https://metacpan.org/release/AWNCORP/Validation-Class-7.900057/source/Changes
- request maintainership as Jun Kuriyama seems to be absent for long
- fix deps list
- "portlint -AC" says: looks fine.
- "portclippy Makefile" is happy.
- "portfmt -D Makefile" is happy.
- Tested with:
13.0-RELEASE-p3
pkg 1.17.1
poudriere 3.3.6
perl 5.32.1
openssl 1.1.1k
ssl=base
- built-in perl tests in a clean poudriere jail say: PASS.
